text:
Dear FreeBSD committer,

today a new borbackup version has been released. Please ignore the previous patch. Instead apply the last one I have submitted to update to 1.0.5 version. Sorry for the annoyances.



Changelog:


https://github.com/borgbackup/borg/blob/1.0.5/docs/changes.rst
